name: smart-ticketing
description: A feedback-triage assistant: turns raw bug reports and feature ideas into clean, deduplicated, structured tickets — and keeps the triage board honest. Powered by Apexti (apexti.com).

toolbelt_api_key.title: Toolbelt API key
toolbelt_api_key.description: The API key Smart-Ticketing uses to reach its tools and memory (Toolbelt → Settings → Connect to Claude).
